title: The Merchant's Lost Wagon
target: recover the salt-merchant's wagon from the brigands camped at the Crow's Ford

contributions.line: Marek's brute strength failed to crack the stubborn iron lock despite his muscular build.
Roselle's cautious approach was betrayed by her overconfidence, and she was spotted slipping past the sentry.

outcomeNarrative: The brigands caught wind of the attempt, forcing the mercenaries into a hasty retreat with the wagon still in enemy hands.
